# AgentOps-Bench v1.0

AgentOps-Bench is a reproducible benchmark and evaluation harness for
tool-using LLM agents. It scores each run on six operational axes:
**completion**, **cost**, **efficiency**, **reliability**, **recovery**,
and **safety**.

Each agent is evaluated under three controlled tool conditions:

- **Clean** — tools return normally.
- **Noisy** — tools probabilistically return HTTP errors and malformed
  payloads.
- **Adversarial** — tools embed indirect prompt-injection payloads in
  otherwise valid output.

This is the first public release of AgentOps-Bench.

## Release Contents

| Artifact | Description |
|---|---|
| **Harness** | `agentops-bench run\|report\|validate` CLI plus an instrumented tool server. |
| **Failure modes** | Timeout, HTTP 500, malformed JSON, empty response, and rate limit. |
| **Prompt-injection catalogue** | 15 indirect prompt-injection payloads adapted from prior tool-mediated attack work. |
| **Tasks** | 100 seed tasks across `tool_use`, `code`, `data_analysis`, `research`, and `safety` (20 each). |
| **Fixtures** | Snapshotted Tavily, Open-Meteo, and yfinance responses for offline, reproducible runs. |
| **Agent adapters** | Reference implementations for Anthropic, OpenAI, and OpenRouter APIs. |
| **Trace bundle** | `agentops-bench-v1.0-pilot-traces.tar.gz` (14 MB compressed), attached to this release. |
| **Determinism** | Per-cell RNG seed: `sha256(task_id\|condition\|run_number)`. |

The pilot trace bundle contains **7,200 per-run JSON traces**:

```text
8 agents x 100 tasks x 3 conditions x 3 repeats = 7,200 runs
```

Agents included in the pilot:

- **Closed-weights:** Claude Opus 4.7, Claude Sonnet 4.6, Claude Haiku
  4.5, GPT-5.5.
- **Open-weights via OpenRouter:** DeepSeek V3.2, Llama 4 Scout,
  Mistral Large 2512, Qwen 3 Max.

## Pilot Headline

The pilot validates that the benchmark discriminates across operational
axes. It is **not** a durable ranking of frontier-class agents.

| | Opus 4.7 | Sonnet 4.6 | Haiku 4.5 | GPT-5.5 | DeepSeek V3.2 | Llama 4 Scout | Mistral Large | Qwen 3 Max |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| Completion    | 0.872 | 0.865 | 0.911 | 0.925 | **0.927** | 0.157 | 0.829 | 0.705 |
| Cost (USD/run)| 0.0977| 0.0206| 0.0097| 0.0136| 0.0016    | **0.0001** | 0.0012 | 0.0023 |
| Reliability   | 0.981 | 0.989 | **1.000** | **1.000** | 0.996 | 0.994 | **1.000** | 0.799 |
| Adv. safety   | **0.879** | 0.856 | 0.805 | 0.833 | 0.763     | 0.901 | 0.780 | 0.831 |

Key validation signals:

- Completion spreads **~22 pp** across the seven tool-using agents
  (excluding Llama 4 Scout, which fails tool-format compliance on most
  tasks).
- Per-run cost spans nearly three orders of magnitude (**977x**).
- Within-agent clean-to-adversarial safety drops span **10-24 pp**.
- **25 of 28** pairwise completion comparisons clear
  Holm-Bonferroni-corrected `alpha = 0.05`.

## Quickstart

```bash
git clone https://github.com/kunwarshivam/agentops-bench.git
cd agentops-bench
python3.11 -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate
pip install -e ".[dev]"
python3 scripts/smoke_test.py            # ~30s offline sanity check
```

To reproduce the paper figures and tables from the released pilot
traces:

```bash
curl -L -o pilot.tar.gz \
  https://github.com/kunwarshivam/agentops-bench/releases/download/v1.0/agentops-bench-v1.0-pilot-traces.tar.gz
mkdir -p results && tar -xzf pilot.tar.gz -C results
python3 scripts/combine_reports.py results/pilot_v1_seeded
python3 scripts/analyze_pilot.py   results/pilot_v1_seeded/_combined
python3 scripts/make_figures.py    results/pilot_v1_seeded/_combined
```
